title: Algerian Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish featuring lamb skewers with a blend of spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together algerian spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Add lamb to the bowl and toss to coat evenly.
Thread lamb onto kebabs, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush kebabs with olive oil and sprinkle with crunchy paprika.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until lamb reaches 63°C.
Let kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
